markdown:
[![STAHMAN GUITARS](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/uploads/1/1/6/9/116924380/stahmanguitars-logo-final2-09_1.png)](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/) - [Home](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/) - [portfolio](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/portfolio.html) - [APPOINTMENTS](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/book.html) - [Thoughts](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/thoughts.html) - [FAQ](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/faq.html) - [Learn](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/learn.html) - [Setup Class](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/setup-class.html) - [Cart (0)](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/portfolio.html#) ## Check out examples of my work by clicking a link below. * * * **[Fretwork](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/fretwork.html)** **[Nuts and Saddles](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/nuts-and-saddles.html)** **[Custom Wiring](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/wiring.html)** ​ **[Structural Repairs](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/structural-repairs.html)** **[Handmade Guitars](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/stahman-made.html)** * * * ## A brief summary of my luthier experience: **-Roberto Venn School of Lutherie, 2011 (Education)** **-KSM Music, Logan, Utah, 2011 (Repair)** **-Thorell Guitars, Logan, Utah 2011-2014 (Repair, Guitar Building)** **-Solo \*and\* Old Town Music, Portland, Oregon, 2014-2017 (Repair, Guitar Building)** **-Occasional stints helping out my friends at their shops (12th Fret PDX, for example)** **-Stahman Guitars in its current Springfield glory, 2017 to present. (Repair only nowadays)** | | | | --- | --- | | ## What my clients are saying:
> "The Eugene/Spfld area is really fortunate to have someone who demonstrates this level of competence and inclusiveness while working on our instruments. I'll be taking all of my guitars here for repairs and setups!" - Adam, via Google
>
> "Amazing attention to detail with the setup and excellent communication about all the work completed to get it right. Price was fair with a surprisingly quick turnaround. My guitar is really fun to play now, thanks Nate!" - Baron, via Google
>
> "...you get what you pay for and more, great quality work in a timely fashion. The whole experience was super positive. Looking forward to doing business with him again soon. Thanks Nate for making my guitar a lot more fun to play.🙂" - Derick, via Google | ## Get in touch:
**I do it all by email!**
[repairbench@stahmanguitars.com\
\*IMPORTANT: No estimates will ever be given by email!\
\
I typically respond to email within 2 business days.\
\
I don't correspond on Saturday, Sunday, or Monday.\
\
​](mailto:repairbench@stahmanguitars.com) I'm just one guy doing all of this, so I appreciate your patience. | * * * ## Check out Instagram and Facebook to see what I'm up to lately: [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61553260460301)[Instagram](https://instagram.com/stahmanguitars) * * * ![Picture](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/uploads/1/1/6/9/116924380/editor/stahmanguitars-logo-final2-09_2.png?1561852097) _Copyright © 2019 Stahman Guitars. All Rights Reserved._ Est. 2011. Serving Eugene/Springfield since 2017. - [Home](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/) - [portfolio](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/portfolio.html) - [APPOINTMENTS](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/book.html) - [Thoughts](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/thoughts.html) - [FAQ](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/faq.html) - [Learn](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/learn.html) - [Setup Class](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/setup-class.html) - Empty Cart Subtotal:$0.00 [Checkout](https://www.eugeneguitarrepair.com/store/checkout?cart=)

__llm_logo_reasoning.reasoning: Selected #0 because it is visible, has a medium/large size, and the alt text matches the brand name 'STAHMAN GUITARS'. It is the most prominent logo on the page.
